name: tesseron
description: MCP gateway that lets any web app expose typed actions to AI agents over WebSocket. Includes a framework skill, a tesseron-docs skill for authoritative spec lookups, a tesseron-dev wiring skill, and explorer/reviewer subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Typed live-app actions for AI agents over WebSocket.
interface.longDescription: MCP gateway with reverse-connection architecture. No fixed ports, no env vars. Expose any web app's actions as MCP tools. Includes framework, tesseron-docs, and tesseron-dev skills plus isolated-context subagents.
